turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for calling billing support, my name is Sam. How can I help today?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Heads up, we do record these calls for training and quality.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: To pull up your account, could you give me the billing email please?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Sure, it's under my name and the usual email I sign in with.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I got charged twice this month and I only have one subscription.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, let me pull up the recent charges and take a look.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: So one of these looks like a duplicate. I can flag it for a refund.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Right, that's exactly what I'm talking about.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I'm done going in circles. I want to speak to a supervisor right now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm sorry it's gotten to this point. Let me get a senior agent on the line.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You're all set. Thanks for your patience, and have a good one.
